zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Turnham於1180年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Stephen de Thornham16歲，母親Edeline de Broc15歲。她和Ralph de Faye至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1244年8月18日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Turnham于1180年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Stephen de Thornham16岁，母亲Edeline de Broc15岁。她和Ralph de Faye至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1244年8月18日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turnham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): habitational name, primarily from Turnham Green in Chiswick (Greater London), but occasionally also from Turnham Hall in Cliffe (Yorkshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English trun, turn ‘circular, round’, possibly also ‘bend (in a river)’, + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure, water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Turnham was born in 1180, in Shropshire, England, her father, Stephen de Thornham, was 16 and her mother, Edeline de Broc, was 15. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Ralph de Faye. She died before 18 August 1244.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Turnham est née en 1180, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Stephen de Thornham, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Edeline de Broc, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Ralph de Faye. Elle est décédée avant 18 août 1244.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Turnham 1180 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen de Thornham 16 und ihre Mutter Edeline de Broc 15. Sie hatte mit Ralph de Faye mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 18. August 1244.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Turnham è nata il nel 1180 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Stephen de Thornham, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Edeline de Broc, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Ralph de Faye. Morì prima del 18 agosto 1244.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Turnham(이)가 1180년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Thornham(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edeline de Broc(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Ralph de Faye(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 8월 18일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Turnham nasceu em 1180, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen de Thornham, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Edeline de Broc, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Ralph de Faye. Ela faleceu antes 18 de agosto de 1244.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Turnham родилась в 1180 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen de Thornham было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Edeline de Broc, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Ralph de Faye. Она умерла перед 18 августа 1244 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Turnham nació en 1180, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen de Thornham, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Edeline de Broc, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Ralph de Faye. Murió antes de 18 de agosto de 1244.
